mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_refresh_token(user_id, token_hash, device_info, ip, user_agent, expires_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{deviceInfo}, #{ip}, #{userAgent}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, revoked_at FROM auth_refresh_token WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW() LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_refresh_token SET revoked_at = NOW() WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL
